scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:www && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run docs
scripts.precommit: npm run build:www && git add www/app.js www/app.js.map && node scripts/updateCommitInfo.js --force-current-date && git add src/lib/commitInfo.ts
scripts.watch: npm run clean && npm run watch:www
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration && npm run test:package
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test
scripts.ci:check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test:unit
scripts.ci:check:full: npm ci && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test:unit
scripts.poc:appplugin-q7-full-scene-proof: npm run poc:appplugin-q7-full-scene-fixture && esbuild scripts/appplugin_hermes_runtime_probe.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --packages=external --outfile=artifacts/appplugin-poc/appplugin_hermes_runtime_probe-full-scene.cjs && esbuild scripts/prove_q7_appplugin_full_scene.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --packages=external --outfile=artifacts/appplugin-poc/prove_q7_appplugin_full_scene.cjs && node artifacts/appplugin-poc/prove_q7_appplugin_full_scene.cjs
scripts.poc:appplugin-q7-full-scene-update-golde: npm run poc:appplugin-q7-full-scene-fixture && esbuild scripts/appplugin_hermes_runtime_probe.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --packages=external --outfile=artifacts/appplugin-poc/appplugin_hermes_runtime_probe-full-scene.cjs && esbuild scripts/prove_q7_appplugin_full_scene.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --packages=external --outfile=artifacts/appplugin-poc/prove_q7_appplugin_full_scene.cjs && node artifacts/appplugin-poc/prove_q7_appplugin_full_scene.cjs --update-golden
scripts.docs: node scripts/generate-docs.js && npm run generate:apk-host-contract && npm run generate:apk-host-bridge
scripts.poc:appplugin-q7-rename-proof: esbuild scripts/appplugin_hermes_runtime_probe.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --packages=external --outfile=artifacts/appplugin-poc/appplugin_hermes_runtime_probe-v33.cjs && esbuild scripts/prove_q7_appplugin_rename.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=artifacts/appplugin-poc/prove_q7_appplugin_rename.cjs && node artifacts/appplugin-poc/prove_q7_appplugin_rename.cjs && node artifacts/appplugin-poc/prove_q7_appplugin_rename.cjs --interaction test/fixtures/appplugin/q7-l5-room-rename-empty.json --output artifacts/appplugin-poc/runtime-probes/q7-l5-room-rename-empty-proof.json --scenario empty-room-name-blocked && node artifacts/appplugin-poc/prove_q7_appplugin_rename.cjs --interaction test/fixtures/appplugin/q7-l5-room-rename-max-length.json --output artifacts/appplugin-poc/runtime-probes/q7-l5-room-rename-max-length-proof.json --scenario appplugin-max-length-filtered && node artifacts/appplugin-poc/prove_q7_appplugin_rename.cjs --interaction test/fixtures/appplugin/q7-l5-room-rename-predefined.json --output artifacts/appplugin-poc/runtime-probes/q7-l5-room-rename-predefined-proof.json --scenario predefined-room-name && node artifacts/appplugin-poc/prove_q7_appplugin_rename.cjs --interaction test/fixtures/appplugin/q7-l5-room-rename-duplicate.json --output artifacts/appplugin-poc/runtime-probes/q7-l5-room-rename-duplicate-proof.json --scenario duplicate-room-name-blocked
scripts.poc:appplugin-q7-rename-failure-proof: npm run poc:appplugin-q7-rename-proof && node artifacts/appplugin-poc/prove_q7_appplugin_rename.cjs --interaction test/fixtures/appplugin/q7-l5-room-rename-device-error.json --output artifacts/appplugin-poc/runtime-probes/q7-l5-room-rename-device-error-proof.json --scenario rename-device-error && node artifacts/appplugin-poc/prove_q7_appplugin_rename.cjs --interaction test/fixtures/appplugin/q7-l5-room-rename-device-timeout.json --output artifacts/appplugin-poc/runtime-probes/q7-l5-room-rename-device-timeout-proof.json --scenario rename-device-timeout && node artifacts/appplugin-poc/prove_q7_appplugin_rename.cjs --interaction test/fixtures/appplugin/q7-l5-room-rename-device-error-retry-success.json --output artifacts/appplugin-poc/runtime-probes/q7-l5-room-rename-device-error-retry-success-proof.json --scenario rename-device-error-retry-success

scripts.copy:protocols: shx mkdir -p build/lib/protocols && shx cp lib/protocols/*.json build/lib/protocols/
scripts.build:git: npm run clean && npm run copy:protocols && tsc -b tsconfig.json && npm run build:www
scripts.poc:appplugin-lab:fixture: npm run poc:appplugin-render-scene && esbuild scripts/generate_appplugin_lab_fixture.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --packages=external --outfile=artifacts/appplugin-poc/generate_appplugin_lab_fixture.cjs && node artifacts/appplugin-poc/generate_appplugin_lab_fixture.cjs && shx rm -f artifacts/appplugin-poc/generate_appplugin_lab_fixture.cjs
